tool_purpose: A tabular regression model trained on the julien-c/kaggle-rounakbanik-pokemon dataset to predict the HP of Pokemon. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Predicting Pokemon HP. API call: pipeline('regression', model='julien-c/pokemon-predict-hp').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: A tabular regression model trained on the julien-c/kaggle-rounakbanik-pokemon dataset to predict the HP of Pokemon. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Predicting Pokemon HP. API call: pipeline('regression', model='julien-c/pokemon-predict-hp').
